children.name: I’m a freelance UX/UI Designer with 3 years of experience, recently graduated with a BS in Information Technology (July 2025). I focus on user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping, and research to create engaging digital experiences. Check out my CV via the ‘My Resume’ button, or connect with me through my social media links or by visiting the Contact page.
children.characters:
I’m a freelance UX/UI Designer with 3 years of experience, recently graduated with a BS in Information Technology (July 2025). I focus on user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping, and research to create engaging digital experiences.

Check out my CV via the ‘My Resume’ button, or connect with me through my social media links or by visiting the Contact page.

children.name: This certification strengthened my foundation in user interface design, user experience principles, wireframing, and design thinking. It enhanced my ability to create structured design workflows, user-focused interfaces, and efficient prototyping processes using Figma.
children.characters: This certification strengthened my foundation in user interface design, user experience principles, wireframing, and design thinking. It enhanced my ability to create structured design workflows, user-focused interfaces, and efficient prototyping processes using Figma.

children.name: Let’s collaborate on your next project and bring your ideas to life with thoughtful design, clear strategy, and impactful results.
